viral_opportunities.snippet:
Author: @luusssso | Text: The Segel House by architect John Lautner 

Malibu, California (1979) | URL: https://x.com/luusssso/status/2079266520685752746 | Date: 2026-07-20 | Likes: 700 | Retweets: 51 | Replies: 10 | Views: 41614 | Author followers: 0
viral_opportunities.author: @luusssso
viral_opportunities.summary: X post spotlighting John Lautner's 1979 Segel House in Malibu, a landmark avant-garde concrete residence.
viral_opportunities.engagement_angle: Join the thread with an architect's take on Lautner's cantilevered concrete forms and how that lineage informs museum-grade fire-resilient villas today.

viral_reply.body: Lautner at his best — that concrete roofline dissolving into the Malibu light is pure sculpture. The Segel House never stops teaching.

viral_opportunities.title: @therossg: Author: @therossg | Text: If you can overcome all the red tape to rebuild your h...
viral_opportunities.snippet: Author: @therossg | Text: If you can overcome all the red tape to rebuild your home in Pacific Palisades, LADWP will delay you going home. We demand changes now! | URL: https://x.com/therossg/status/2078395871205495179 | Date: 2026-07-18 | Likes: 109 | Retweets: 17 | Replies: 3 | Views: 4122 | Author followers: 0
viral_opportunities.author: @therossg

viral_reply.body: The utility timeline is the hidden bottleneck no one budgets for. Getting people home faster has to be part of the rebuild conversation — you're right to push.

viral_opportunities.title: @artndesign823: Author: @artndesign823 | Text: A cloudy & windy day at Manhattan Beach Pier in L...
viral_opportunities.snippet:
Author: @artndesign823 | Text: A cloudy & windy day at Manhattan Beach Pier in Los Angeles!🌊✨ 

Transformed the moody ocean vibes into a serene and modern living room. 

Cool grays, flowing textures, and a sense of coastal tranquility.

#InteriorDesign #ModernHome #CoastalDecor #ArtNDesignByLily | URL: https://x.com/artndesign823/status/2078183791764689406 | Date: 2026-07-17 | Likes: 8 | Retweets: 1 | Replies: 3 | Views: 596 | Author followers: 0
viral_opportunities.author: @artndesign823

viral_reply.body: The moody coastal palette translates beautifully — those cool grays and flowing textures really carry the ocean mood indoors. Lovely restraint.

viral_opportunities.title: @Debi_Calvet: Author: @Debi_Calvet | Text: When we went under contract for our Florida home, w...
viral_opportunities.snippet: Author: @Debi_Calvet | Text: When we went under contract for our Florida home, we had no idea of the state’s strict construction rules. Photos of our exterior walls in reinforced concrete-block masonry stunned us. My native California, which we left last May, could learn so much from Florida. | URL: https://x.com/Debi_Calvet/status/1878873636880421213 | Date: 2025-01-22 | Likes: 9 | Retweets: 0 | Replies: 0 | Views: 142 | Author followers: 0
viral_opportunities.author: @Debi_Calvet
viral_opportunities.summary: Homeowner recounts learning about Florida's strict reinforced concrete-block masonry construction rules.
viral_opportunities.engagement_angle: Off-state and dated; low priority but reinforced-masonry topic is materially adjacent to our work.

viral_reply.body: Florida's masonry standards are a real case study — non-combustible assemblies measurably shift both loss outcomes and underwriting. California has a lot to learn here.
